source_regulations: PerBPOM No. 5/2018 - Heavy Metal Contamination Limits

07.1.description: Baked cereal-based products including biscuits, crackers, cookies, wafers, and similar products

parameters.name: Nutrition Declaration
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 22/2019 Article 5 and Annex I

parameters.name: Ingredient List
parameters.standard: Complete with descending order by weight

parameters.name: Net Content
parameters.standard: Must be in metric units (g or ml)

parameters.name: Allergen Declaration
parameters.standard: Must declare gluten, milk, eggs, nuts, soybeans in ingredient list

14.1.description: Drinks including fruit juices, nectars, ready-to-drink beverages, and powders for reconstitution

parameters.name: Preservatives (Sorbic acid, Benzoic acid)
parameters.standard: Sorbic acid: max 300 mg/kg; Benzoic acid: max 200 mg/kg (as acid)
parameters.notes: Cannot be combined in carbonated drinks

parameters.name: Sweeteners (Acesulfame K, Aspartame)
parameters.notes: Must declare on label if used

parameters.name: Artificial Colors (Tartrazine, etc.)
parameters.standard: Per approved additive list (PerBPOM No. 13/2020 Annex III)
parameters.notes: Warning statement required for certain colors

parameters.name: Caffeine Content
parameters.standard: Maximum 150 mg/L (energy drinks), no restriction for coffee/tea drinks
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 13/2020; BPOM Regulation on Energy Drinks
parameters.notes: Mandatory warning for pregnant women and children

parameters.name: Listeria monocytogenes
parameters.standard: Not detected in 25ml for chilled products

parameters.name: Lead (Pb)
parameters.notes: Lower limit than solid foods due to volume consumption

parameters.name: Mercury (Hg)
parameters.notes: Strict limit due to high consumption

parameters.name: Arsenic (As)
parameters.notes: Includes both organic and inorganic forms

parameters.name: Nutrition Declaration
parameters.standard: Required: energy, protein, fat, carbohydrate, sugar, sodium, fiber (if claimed)
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 22/2019 Article 5 and Annex I

parameters.name: Fruit/Juice Content Declaration
parameters.standard: Must state percentage of fruit content (minimum 35% for nectar)

parameters.name: Storage Instructions
parameters.standard: Must state 'Keep refrigerated' for refrigerated products; 'Store in cool, dry place' for UHT

parameters.name: Warning for Colorant (if applicable)
parameters.standard: May affect activity and attention in children (for tartrazine, sunset yellow, etc.)
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 13/2020 Annex III; PerBPOM No. 22/2019

parameters.name: Caffeine Warning (for coffee/tea/energy drinks)
parameters.standard: Not recommended for children, pregnant women, and caffeine-sensitive individuals
parameters.regulation: BPOM Regulation on Caffeine in Beverages
parameters.notes: Mandatory for beverages with >50 mg/L caffeine

01.2.description: Fermented milk products including yogurt, kefir, and similar cultured dairy

parameters.name: Protein Content
parameters.notes: Dairy protein has different conversion factor

parameters.name: Stabilizers (Pectin, CMC, Gelatin)
parameters.notes: Must be declared in ingredient list

parameters.name: Lactic Acid Bacteria Count (Live cultures)
parameters.standard: Minimum 10^7 CFU/g or ml (at expiry date)
parameters.regulation: SNI 2981:2009 Section 5; PerBPOM No. 16/2016 Annex I
parameters.notes: Probiotic claim must be maintained through shelf life

parameters.name: Total Plate Count (TPC)
parameters.notes: Indicator of hygiene and shelf life

parameters.name: Listeria monocytogenes
parameters.standard: Not detected in 25g (for chilled products with shelf life > 10 days)

parameters.name: Bacillus cereus
parameters.notes: For products with shelf life > 10 days

parameters.name: Lead (Pb)
parameters.notes: Stringent limit due to dairy matrix

parameters.name: Nutrition Declaration
parameters.standard: Required: energy, protein, fat, carbohydrate, sugar, sodium, calcium
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 22/2019 Article 5 and Annex I

parameters.name: Probiotic/Live Culture Claim
parameters.standard: Must specify genus and species, minimum 10^8 CFU/serving
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 16/2016; BPOM Guidelines on Probiotic Claims
parameters.notes: Must be supported by scientific evidence

parameters.name: Storage Temperature
parameters.standard: Must state 'Keep refrigerated at 4-8Â°C' for dairy products
parameters.notes: Critical for shelf life and safety

parameters.name: Shelf Life and Expiry Date
parameters.standard: Must show 'Best before' or 'Exp date' with day/month/year

parameters.name: Allergen Declaration
parameters.standard: Must declare 'Contains milk' prominently; other allergens if applicable
parameters.notes: Milk allergy is common, especially in children

supplement.description: Products intended to supplement diet including vitamins, minerals, herbal extracts, amino acids, and combination supplements in various dosage forms

parameters.name: Active Ingredient Potency
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 11/2020 Article 8; PerBPOM No. 16/2016 Annex III
parameters.test_method: HPLC-UV/FL, titrimetric, or enzymatic methods per ingredient

parameters.name: Disintegration Time (Tablets/Capsules)
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 11/2020 Article 9; FI Edition VI

parameters.name: Moisture Content
parameters.test_method: Karl Fischer titration or loss on drying

parameters.name: Iron (as Fe)
parameters.notes: Various forms: ferrous sulfate, ferrous fumarate, iron bis-glycinate

parameters.name: Omega-3 (EPA + DHA)
parameters.standard: 90-110% of label claim for EPA+DHA combined
parameters.notes: Must specify EPA and DHA individually if claimed

parameters.name: Protein Content (for protein powders)
parameters.notes: Must account for added amino acids

parameters.name: Amino Acid Profile (for protein supplements)
parameters.standard: Individual amino acids: 90-110% of declared value
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 11/2020; PerBPOM No. 16/2016 Annex III
parameters.notes: Required for claims on specific amino acids

parameters.name: Herbal/Botanical Marker Compounds
parameters.standard: Must contain minimum specified amount of marker compound
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 11/2020 Article 8; BPOM Guidelines on Herbal Products
parameters.notes: Each herb requires specific marker compound identification

parameters.name: Preservatives (if used)
parameters.standard: Within limits specified in PerBPOM No. 13/2020 Annex I
parameters.notes: Sorbic acid, benzoic acid limited in supplements

parameters.name: Sweeteners (if used)
parameters.standard: Within approved limits per PerBPOM No. 13/2020 Annex II

parameters.name: E. coli
parameters.standard: Must not be detected in 1g (n=5, c=0)

parameters.name: Clostridia (for ingredients of animal origin)
parameters.notes: For gelatin, collagen, and animal-derived ingredients

parameters.name: Probiotic Count (if claim probiotic)
parameters.test_method: Selective media pour plate (MRS, BCP, etc.)
parameters.notes: Must maintain viability through shelf life; strain identification required

parameters.name: Lead (Pb)
parameters.notes: Higher limit for herbs due to environmental uptake

parameters.name: Cadmium (Cd)
parameters.notes: Stringent limits for supplements due to daily consumption

parameters.name: Mercury (Hg)
parameters.notes: Fish oil requires mercury analysis; marine contamination concern

parameters.name: Arsenic (As)
parameters.notes: Herbs grown in contaminated soil can accumulate arsenic

parameters.name: Copper (Cu)
parameters.notes: Contamination from equipment or raw materials

parameters.name: Zinc (Zn)
parameters.notes: High doses of zinc can cause copper deficiency

parameters.name: Aflatoxin B1 (for herbal/plant supplements)
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 5/2018 Annex III; BPOM Guidelines on Mycotoxins
parameters.notes: Critical for herbal products from tropical regions

parameters.name: Histamine (for fish oil supplements)
parameters.notes: From decomposition of histidine in fish

parameters.name: Supplement Facts Panel
parameters.standard: Must follow PerBPOM No. 22/2019 + PerBPOM No. 11/2020 format for supplements
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 22/2019 Article 5; PerBPOM No. 11/2020 Article 12
parameters.notes: Different format from regular nutrition labeling

parameters.name: Recommended Use/Dosage
parameters.standard: Must state daily dose clearly, not to exceed recommended dose
parameters.notes: Dosage must be supported by safety data

parameters.name: Health Claims Authorization
parameters.standard: Claims must be approved category or require scientific evidence submission
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 11/2020 Article 15; BPOM Guidelines on Health Claims
parameters.notes: Prohibited claims cannot be used; approved claims have specific wording

parameters.name: Contraindications and Warnings
parameters.standard: Must state if not for pregnant women, children, specific disease conditions
parameters.notes: Specific to active ingredients and target population

parameters.name: Drug Interaction Warnings
parameters.standard: Required for supplements with known drug interactions (e.g., St. John's Wort, Ginkgo)
parameters.notes: Must be updated as new interactions are discovered

parameters.name: Storage Conditions
parameters.standard: Must state 'Store in cool, dry place' or specific temperature requirement
parameters.notes: Probiotics and some vitamins require refrigeration

parameters.name: Manufacturing/Import License (NIE)
parameters.standard: Product registration number: DOS followed by 13 digits
parameters.notes: Different from ML number; supplements require NIE (Nomor Induk Erspo)

parameters.name: Allergen Declaration
parameters.standard: Must declare milk, egg, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, gluten
parameters.notes: Mandatory for all allergens present in ingredients

parameters.name: Claim Substantiation Evidence
parameters.standard: Must have scientific studies cited if using 'clinically proven' or similar claims
parameters.notes: Claims category determines evidence requirement level

08.3.description: Meat products that have been cured, smoked, dried, or otherwise processed including sausages, ham, bacon, dried beef, and similar products

parameters.name: Water Content (for dried products)
parameters.notes: Critical for shelf life and quality

parameters.name: Protein Content
parameters.notes: Must meet minimum protein to distinguish from extenders

parameters.name: Fat Content
parameters.notes: Labeled claims must match actual content

parameters.name: Salt (NaCl) Content
parameters.regulation: SNI 01-4620-1998 Section 5; BPOM Guidelines on Sodium Reduction
parameters.notes: High salt for preservation; 'low sodium' claim has specific limits

parameters.name: Nitrite (NO2-) Content
parameters.test_method: Colorimetric Griess test or ion chromatography
parameters.notes: Must specify if 'no added nitrite/nitrate' claim is made

parameters.name: Nitrate (NO3-) Content
parameters.notes: Can convert to nitrite during processing

parameters.name: Starch Content
parameters.standard: Maximum 2% (if used as binder), Maximum 5% (total extenders)
parameters.notes: Must be declared in ingredients if >1%

parameters.name: TVB-N (Total Volatile Basic Nitrogen)
parameters.standard: Maximum 40 mg/100g for fresh sausage, Maximum 50 mg/100g for dried products
parameters.test_method: Steam distillation with Conway dish or Kjeldahl apparatus

parameters.name: pH Value
parameters.notes: Varies by product type and fermentation

parameters.name: Wood Smoke Compounds (for smoked products)
parameters.notes: Authenticity marker for traditional smoke curing

parameters.name: Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbons (PAH) - Benzo(a)pyrene
parameters.standard: Maximum 0.01 mg/kg (smoked meat), Maximum 0.005 mg/kg (for infants)
parameters.notes: From smoke; liquid smoke flavoring must be analyzed separately

parameters.name: Sodium Nitrite/Sodium Nitrate (for color fixing)
parameters.standard: Maximum 150 mg/kg (as sodium nitrite); Maximum 300 mg/kg (as sodium nitrate)
parameters.notes: Required to achieve characteristic cured color

parameters.name: MonoSodium Glutamate (MSG)
parameters.notes: Must be declared in ingredient list

parameters.name: Total Plate Count (TPC)
parameters.notes: Varies by processing and shelf life

parameters.name: Salmonella sp.
parameters.notes: Zero tolerance pathogen; critical for raw meat products

parameters.name: Listeria monocytogenes
parameters.standard: Not detected in 25g for ready-to-eat products (n=5, c=0)

parameters.name: Clostridium perfringens
parameters.notes: Spoilage organism; indicator for cooked products

parameters.name: Enterobacteriaceae
parameters.standard: Maximum 10^3 CFU/g (cooked products), Maximum 10^4 CFU/g (dried products)

parameters.name: Lead (Pb)
parameters.notes: Higher limit for processed due to concentration during drying

parameters.name: Cadmium (Cd)
parameters.notes: Bioaccumulation in kidney and liver by-products

parameters.name: Arsenic (As)
parameters.notes: Contamination from feed or processing environment

parameters.name: Meat Species Declaration
parameters.standard: Must clearly state type of meat (beef, pork, chicken) in product name and ingredient list
parameters.notes: Halal certification requires specific meat declaration

parameters.name: Nutrition Declaration
parameters.standard: Required: energy, protein, fat, carbohydrate, sodium
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 22/2019 Article 5 and Annex I
parameters.notes: Sodium content must be declared prominently for 'low sodium' claims

parameters.name: Nitrite/Nitrate Declaration
parameters.standard: Must be declared if used as additive; 'No added nitrite' claim has specific requirements
parameters.notes: Natural nitrite from celery powder must also be declared

parameters.name: Storage and Cooking Instructions
parameters.standard: Must state 'Keep refrigerated' and 'Cook thoroughly before consumption' for raw/cured products

parameters.name: Shelf Life and Expiry Date
parameters.standard: Must show day/month/year; 'Use by' or 'Best before' format
parameters.notes: Must match shelf life validation study

parameters.name: Allergen Declaration
parameters.standard: Must declare gluten (if soy/wheat binders used), milk (whey powder), eggs (if used)
parameters.notes: Hidden allergens in binders and fillers

parameters.name: Halal Certification Mark (if applicable)
parameters.standard: Must display halal logo from recognized certifier (MUI or recognized agency)
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 22/2019; Law No. 33/2014 on Halal Product Assurance
parameters.notes: Required for Muslim-majority market; pork ingredient must be declared

02.1.category_name: Unprocessed Fresh Fish and Fish Products
02.1.description: Fresh, chilled, or frozen fish, crustaceans, mollusks and other aquatic products

parameters.name: Histamine
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 16/2016 Annex II; Codex Stan 70-1981

parameters.name: Methyl Mercury
parameters.regulation: PerBPOM No. 5/2018 Annex I; Codex Stan 307-1995

parameters.name: Product Name and Species
parameters.standard: Must state common name and scientific name

parameters.name: Catch Date/Production Date
parameters.standard: Must show date of catch or production

03.description: Canned, dried, salted, smoked fish and fishery products including fish sauce, paste, and concentrates

parameters.name: Net Weight and Drained Weight
parameters.standard: Must declare both net and drained weight

parameters.name: Fish Species Declaration
parameters.standard: Must state fish species (common and scientific name)

parameters.name: Preservation Method
parameters.standard: Must indicate method (salted, dried, smoked, etc.)

parameters.name: Storage Instructions
parameters.standard: Must indicate storage condition after opening

04.1.description: Fresh, chilled, or frozen whole fruits and vegetables without any processing

parameters.name: Pesticide Residues (Multi-residue)
parameters.standard: Per PerBPOM No. 4/2022 and Codex MRLs

parameters.name: Cadmium (Cd)
parameters.standard: Max 0.05 mg/kg (leafy veg), Max 0.2 mg/kg (root veg)

parameters.name: Grade/Class
parameters.standard: Must indicate quality class if graded

parameters.name: Organic Certification Mark
parameters.standard: Must have organic certification body mark if claimed

parameters.name: Allergen Declaration
parameters.standard: N/A for plain fresh produce (declare if processed with allergens)

04.2.description: Canned, dried, frozen, preserved fruits and vegetables including jams, sauces, purees, and concentrates

parameters.name: Preservatives Declaration
parameters.standard: Must declare type and amount in ingredient list

parameters.name: Allergen Declaration
parameters.standard: Must declare sulfites if used as preservative
